# DupeDose

> AI-powered discovery engine for affordable beauty dupes — skincare, makeup, fragrance, and hair care. Search any luxury or viral product and get the best alternatives, ranked by a match score with the reasoning behind each pick.

DupeDose helps shoppers find cheaper alternatives ("dupes") to luxury and viral beauty products (skincare, makeup, fragrance, and hair care). Every recommendation includes a match score and a plain-language reason explaining why it's a good alternative (shared ingredients/actives, comparable finish or performance, price savings). Links go to retailers (Amazon, Sephora, Ulta, Target, and brand sites) where each product can be purchased.

## Categories
- Beauty: skincare (moisturizers, serums, cleansers, sunscreen), makeup (foundation, concealer, lipstick, mascara, blush, bronzer, brows), and fragrance.
- Hair Care: treatments, shampoos, oils, masks, styling tools.

## Key pages
- Search: /search?q=QUERY — find dupes for any product
- Categories: /category/skincare, /category/makeup, /category/fragrance, /category/hair
- Product pages: /product/SLUG — original product + ranked alternatives with reasons
- Compare: /compare — side-by-side product comparison

## Notes
- Prices shown are reference estimates and may change; confirm on the retailer's site.
- DupeDose earns affiliate commissions from qualifying purchases (Amazon Associate + others), at no extra cost to users.
